title: Define structured PR task metadata
goal: Define and implement a structured Bureau task marker contract for PRs so duplicate detection prefers explicit metadata over broad title/body heuristics.

metadata.source_review: Follow-up from PR #177 open-PR claim guard review.
metadata.safety_boundary: Metadata improves duplicate detection but does not grant PR creation, review or merge authority.

acceptance.assertion: A documented PR marker such as a label or body field binds a PR to exactly one or more Bureau task IDs.
The Open-PR guard prefers structured markers and treats title/body/branch scanning as explicit fallback with lower confidence diagnostics.
Tests cover T001, T0010, T001-EXTRA and branch suffix cases according to the documented task-ID grammar.
